preconditions: User has network access to the application URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined

testCases.title: Verify login page loads successfully
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads successfully and displays login form elements including username field, password field, and login button.

testCases.title: Verify successful login with valid username and password
steps: Enter username haklarr in the username field
Enter password Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: User is authenticated successfully and redirected to the application home or dashboard page.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with incorrect username
steps: Enter username invaliduser in the username field
Enter password Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt fails and an error message indicating invalid username or password is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with incorrect password
steps: Enter username haklarr in the username field
Enter password WrongPassword in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt fails and an error message indicating invalid username or password is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are blank
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected and validation or error message indicates that username and password cannot be blank.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username is blank
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected and validation message indicates username is required.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when password is blank
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected and validation message indicates password is required.

testCases.title: Verify username field accepts leading and trailing spaces
steps: Enter username with spaces before and after value such as space haklarr space
testCases.expectedResult: System trims leading and trailing spaces or rejects the login attempt with appropriate validation.

testCases.title: Verify password field accepts leading and trailing spaces
steps: Enter password with leading and trailing spaces around Icstunnel1
testCases.expectedResult: System handles leading and trailing spaces appropriately and either trims them or rejects login with a validation message.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with whitespace-only username and password
steps: Enter spaces only in username field
Enter spaces only in password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected and validation indicates fields cannot contain only whitespace.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with very long username input
steps: Enter a very long string of characters exceeding normal username length in username field
testCases.expectedResult: System handles long input safely and either rejects with validation or processes without breaking the UI.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with very long password input
steps: Enter an extremely long password string
testCases.expectedResult: System handles long password input safely without UI or server errors and login fails with appropriate message.

testCases.title: Verify username field accepts special characters input
steps: Enter username containing special characters such as user!@#
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and application handles special characters safely without system errors.

testCases.title: Verify password field masks entered characters
steps: Enter text in the password field
Observe the characters displayed in the field
testCases.expectedResult: Password characters are masked and not visible in plain text.

testCases.title: Verify login using Enter key submission
testCases.expectedResult: Login form is submitted and user is logged in successfully.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with case-sensitive username variation
testCases.expectedResult: System processes according to username case-sensitivity rules and either authenticates correctly or shows invalid credentials message.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with case-sensitive password variation
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and invalid username or password message is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify multiple rapid login button clicks handling
steps: Click the Login button multiple times rapidly
testCases.expectedResult: System processes a single authentication request and prevents duplicate submissions or errors.

testCases.title: Verify copy paste functionality for username and password fields
steps: Copy username haklarr from an external source
Paste the value into the username field
Copy password Icstunnel1 from an external source
Paste the value into the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login works correctly using pasted values and user is authenticated successfully.

testCases.title: Verify error message visibility after failed login attempt
testCases.expectedResult: An error message clearly indicating login failure is displayed on the login page.
